scope: Live in-app browser traversal of generic bound tool create_crm_client against API 4160 and Web 3160 with OpenRouter configured.
secretsPolicy: OpenRouter key was loaded from ignored .env.local and is not emitted. No cookies or credentials are stored in this evidence.
steps: Submitted browser prompt instructing exactly one generic mutation tool create_crm_client with unique client name and optional fields.
Observed live assistant response and review panel with selected action Создать клиента.
Clicked Применить выбранное in browser; UI reported Применил 1 изменение and selected action status became применено.
Read back GET /api/workspace/clients and found the created client.
expected: A configured live provider should propose a generic CRM mutation, execute it through /api/workspace/clients, and the created client should be visible via readback.
actual: Pass for the CRM generic redispatch browser variant: the UI applied create_crm_client and backend readback found the client.
evidence: Browser UI showed Создать клиента selected/applied.
API client readback matched created name/status and creator tenant.
observations: The create_crm_client tool description advertises optional email/phone/website/address fields, but /api/workspace/clients readback only exposed name/status/description for this client; this may be a stale tool description or route/read-model gap.
The review drawer again displayed 5 proposed changes while only 1 action was selected/applied and repeated the “4 изменения записаны в журнал проекта” copy/count inconsistency.
remainingForRisk: Provider matrix beyond OpenRouter remains open unless intentionally scoped out.
Browser denied/degraded UI for missing provider remains open.
